hero.creator: Application Creator
hero.description: I design high-performance modern web applications with React, Next.js, Node.js and MongoDB. Discover my projects and feel free to contact me for any collaboration.

about.title: About me
about.description1: Junior Full-Stack Developer certified by GOMYCODE (2026). Passionate about creating high-performance responsive web applications, I master modern technologies like React, Next.js, Node.js and MongoDB.
about.description2: I have developed several concrete projects, including an e-commerce platform (SUNU-MARCHE), a trainee tracking application (Intern-Track) and a school management software. These experiences strengthened my ability to work in teams, solve complex problems and deliver quality solutions.
about.description3: Outside of coding, I am passionate about sports, technology watch and mind games. I am open to professional opportunities as a full-stack developer.

contact.title: Contact me
contact.subtitle: Let's stay in touch
contact.description: I am always open to new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to contact me to discuss your projects.
